case_title: SILVER CYBER TECH., INC., AS JOINT EMPLOYERS et al VS. ANDREW S HAZLETT

docket_entries.description: ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FOR ALL PURPOSES UNDER LEAD CASE NUMBER 405393 WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS INCLUDED IN INSTANT MOTION: 404034, 404035, 404040/404039, 404047/404045, 404264, 404265, 404274, 404275, 404276, 404290, 404304; AND WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS NOT SUBJECT TO INSTANT MOTION: 405393, 405396, 405407, 405413, 405402, 405399, 405398, 405410, 404271; ALL CASES CONSOLIDATED UNDER #405393 PER NOTICED MOTION AND PER COURT'S OWN MOTION UNDER CCP 1048, SO STIPULATED BY COUNSEL. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. IN ADDITION, MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO 05/07/02 UNDER #405393. DEFT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL SUPPORTING PAPERS RE INDIGENCE BY 04/25; RESPONSE DUE 05/01. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER.
